# Gani Ramadhan

> Full Stack Engineer based in Bandung, West Java, Indonesia.

Canonical site: https://ganiramadhan.site

Primary pages:
- Portfolio home: https://ganiramadhan.site/
- Projects: https://ganiramadhan.site/projects
- Experience: https://ganiramadhan.site/experience
- About: https://ganiramadhan.site/about
- Contact: https://ganiramadhan.site/contact

Profile:
Gani Ramadhan is a Bandung-based full stack engineer focused on reliable web products, product engineering, clean interfaces, backend systems, data stores, infrastructure, and observability.

Core technologies:
React, Next.js, TypeScript, Go, Laravel, PostgreSQL, Cassandra, Redis, RabbitMQ, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Grafana, Loki, Promtail.

Location and service area:
Bandung, West Java, Indonesia. Available for Indonesian and remote software engineering work.

Representative projects:
- SAKU Finance: AI-powered personal finance SaaS with natural-language transaction logging, OCR, wallets, budgets, goals, reminders, and finance insights.
- Mekarjaya Village: village profile and operational web system.
- HRMIS Abujapi: HR management system for employee data, attendance, payroll, and performance workflows.
- Abujapi CMS and company profile: content management and profile systems.
- Batik Merawit: commerce and product catalog web platform.

Contact:
- Email: ganiramadhan35@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ganiramadhan35/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Ganiramadhan
